name: global_context_8192
purpose: 8K context exercises all five global-attention layers

reference.llama_cpp_worktree_note: local common/debug.cpp patch adds QK_DUMP_DIR/QK_DUMP_FILTER; it does not alter model arithmetic unless those variables are set
reference.server_command: GGML_VK_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2 rtk proxy /mnt/data/llama.cpp-master/build/bin/llama-server -m /mnt/data/models/gemma-4-26B-A4B-qat/gemma-4-26B_q4_0-it.gguf -dev Vulkan0 -sm none -mg 0 -ngl 99 -fa on -ctk f16 -ctv f16 -fit off -c 16384 -b 8192 -ub 512 --parallel 1 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18271
reference.request: POST /completion twice with prompt=input_ids and sampler_settings below

input_construction.method: numeric chat envelope plus repeated tokenized body, truncated exactly
input_construction.body_text: The observatory log records a clear northern sky, a steady west wind, and three calibration pulses before sunrise.
